strengths: Long software engineering tenure spanning web, mobile, embedded, and microservices since 2009
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founded and maintains an open-source GIS platform, showing initiative and product ownership
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published AI products, or platform-scale AI work as required for a Principal AI Strategy role
Career has been at Senior/Staff IC level at small-to-mid companies, with no Director-level or Principal-level leadership, advisory, or strategy experience
Limited cloud-platform depth — some AWS CDK usage, but no evidence of cloud product strategy, large-scale infrastructure design, or partner/customer advisory work

key_factors.factor: Missing AI/ML expertise and shipped AI products
No Director-level IC or strategic advisory experience
Shallow cloud-platform and large-scale infrastructure background

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned hands-on engineer with broad full-stack and polyglot experience, but the resume shows weak alignment with a Principal Engineer AI Strategy role. There is no record of recognized AI expertise, AI products shipped at scale, advanced AI-related graduate study, or cloud-platform strategy work with strategic customers and partners. Recent AI exposure is limited to early MCP tooling at a small employer, and prior roles top out at Senior/Staff IC at mid-sized companies — far from the Director-level individual contributor profile, entrepreneurial-in-large-org background, and industry-recognized AI thought leadership the position requires.
